narrative:
Cols 53-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 639 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
